```json
  "findings": [
    "Breaker/conductor ampacity mismatch: overcurrent device rating exceeds conductor ampacity.",
    "Conductor insulation and termination temperature ratings not verified against 110.14(C).",
    "Potential for conductor overheating, insulation damage, and fire under normal or fault conditions."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Verify conductor ampacity against NEC 310 and termination temperature limitations per 110.14(C).",
    "Replace or resize breaker to be not greater than conductor ampacity per NEC 240.4.",
    "Confirm overcurrent protection is selected and coordinated per engineered drawings and specifications.",
    "Re-inspect and document corrected installation before energization."
  ],
  "rationale": "NEC 240 requires overcurrent protection to be selected so that conductors are protected against overcurrent. A breaker/conductor ampacity mismatch means the breaker may not trip before conductor damage occurs, violating NEC 240.4 and creating a high fire and shock risk. Termination temperature ratings under  110.14(C) must also be considered when sizing protection. The work is non-compliant and must be corrected before acceptance.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 240 Overcurrent Protection",
    "NEC 240.4 Protection of Conductors",
    "NEC 110.14(C) Termination Temperature Ratings"
  ]
}
```
